name: useMutation
description: Hook that defines the logic when mutate data
examples: const { mutate, mutateAsync, isLoading, isError, isSuccess, error, data } = useMutation((name) => Promise.resolve(name));

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: The callback function to be invoked

source.source: * @param {(body: Body) => Promise<Data>} callback The callback function to be invoked

tokens.description: The callback function to be invoked

source.source: * @param {boolean | number} [options.retry] The retry count of requests

parameters.name: options.onSuccess
